Project.title: Project
Project.description: A freelance project including scope, price, current payment status, and milestones.

owner_id.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the freelancer who owns the project doc.

client_name.description: The name of the target client.

project_name.description: The title or scope of the project.

amount_due.description: The payment due amount in INR.

is_paid.description: Whether the client has successfully completed the UPI/Card checkout simulation.

file_name.description: The original name of the uploaded source deliverable.

file_size.description: The size string of the locked file.

milestones.description: An array of maps containing specific milestone targets.

/projects/{projectId}.description: Primary storage of freelance projects and their locked status.
